reviews.review_description:
This goes out to the developers! 
This is a great archer arcade game with great graphics in a story with it. I would love to ask is there any way you could add a option where you could use smooth turn or Snapturn as well because it is hard for me to play throughout the game. 
I am in a wheelchair And it's hard for me to keep moving around. Thanks in advance

reviews.review_title: More engaging than some other TD archery
reviews.review_description: It's no In Death: Unchained. But it's also not nearly as awful as Elven Assassin. Bow mechanics are good but aiming accuracy can be tricky. (Hitting those little bull eyes in boss fights is pretty frustrating.) Very cartoony, which is fine, but I wish the graphics were crisper. I like that there are a variety of objectives and enemies. Price seems about right.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! It seems you're a senior archery game fan, and we hope you enjoy the game. Please feel free to share any feedback with us at info@dreamgrid.io.

reviews.review_description: Great game and creativity, but i’d appreciate a mute “nice” voice thats after every shot haha or just removed entirely. Then its 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thanks Manny. This is a very interesting suggestion. Currently we have two audio setting options, one is for VFX and one is for BGM, but no option for  the "voice".
We will seriously consider your suggestions.

reviews.review_description: Previously, I played a game called 'Long Bow' on Steam, and I liked the feel of it, so I started looking for similar games on Quest. By chance, I discovered this newly launched game, and I couldn't stop playing it. It almost inherits all the advantages of 'Long Bow,' with even richer gameplay. It's as if this game was made just for me, and I really like it
Best VR TD game you can get right now. Looks and runs great on quest 3. Must buy for library I’d say.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your love of our game. If you have any suggestions, please feel free to let us know. We will continue to improve the game.

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is incredibly intuitive, with a lot of fun and breathtaking scenery. It deserves the highest of praises and a must-play for any VR enthusiast looking to test their archery skills while saving a world of wonder. Five stars!

I have most of the archery games on the quest headset and the two games that are played the most: this and "in death unchained". Yes, the graphics are cartoony and it looks like a game more suited to kids but make no mistake it does get more and more challenging even for older people but it is super fun and deserves a place in everyone's library.

I have experienced real archery before, and this is my first time playing a VR archery game. It simulates a very real archery experience, including the trajectory of the arrow. The levels are designed to be fun, but also challenging, especially the BOSS battles.

reviews.review_title: best VR TD game I've ever seen
reviews.review_description: smoothly shooting, colorful vision, easilist newbie start guide,I love this, its the best td game i ve ever played, cannot stop to challenge next level and three star record.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it, thank you.

reviews.review_description: Very creative game. A better blend of tower defence and archery, and the level design is user-friendly, moderately difficult, strategic, and not boring. If the skills can be released a little more, it will be more enjoyable.

reviews.review_title: Easy to play, harder to master
reviews.review_description: Great archer game, i really like the fantasy colorful mood, Great for exercise, after a long session i am really tired, if you like fantasy and archery this game is for you

As an enthusiast of archery shooting games, this is a game that makes you want to keep playing. It's not too tiring to play, and there are many gameplay elements to explore. Knocking off monsters' helmets triggers funny animations, and monsters will sometimes stop to taunt you, which adds a playful element to the game. The large disc used to attack Bosses is very creative. I found that long shots and combos easily score high points, especially with combos. I was thrilled to achieve a highest combo of 13 hits
I'm trying archery for the first time. The game looks good, and the characters are funny. I'm getting the hang of shooting quickly. I'm surprisingly accurate. Can't wait to play more levels!

This  game features beautiful graphics, including scenes and various monsters which are very humorous. The pace of the game is mostly relaxed, but it becomes tense when more monsters appear, or a Boss shows up. To pass the levels, you need precise archery skills and the ability to combine different skills. I've only passed the first level; the second level increases in difficulty with many challenging monsters appearing, so I have to continue fighting them.

This is an interesting game. Pull back, aim, shoot - it's simple but addictive and exciting, offering a fun-filled shooting experience. Looking forward to a multiplayer mode in the future to enjoy the collaborative fun of archery.

developer_response.body: Hello, William! Thanks for you kindly words. We are working on co-op mode, hopefully the new version will be released soon.

reviews.review_title: Good archery game, definitely worth play
reviews.review_description: I'm a bit sensitive to 3D, but playing this game didn't make me feel uncomfortable. It includes many innovative shooting mechanics, and the combo effects are fantastic. It's worth buying for friends who like archery games.

This game has excellent sense of shooting rhythm. The design of the monsters ignites the desire to shoot, and the layout and color scheme of the scenes are visually comforting, allowing players to immerse themselves unconsciously into the game. The visual effects of skill release and the sensation of impact feel great. The most impressive part is the Boss battles; when the first Boss appears, standing on the mountaintop like King Kong, it's truly awe-inspiring.

This archery game is packed with fun and is perfect for unwinding after a day's work. The game features cartoon-style graphics with bright, lively colors and a background score that's light and rhythmic, importantly, without causing any dizziness. The controls are incredibly user-friendly, simulating real-life archery movements. Drawing the bow and shooting come with finely detailed vibrations and sound effects, enhancing the realism. The level and enemy designs are full of surprising details, such as monsters occasionally bickering and fighting among themselves as they charge the tower, or some hilariously tripping and falling on their behinds when jumping off steps. It's thoroughly entertaining and also very suitable for playing with children.

The big boss levels are creatively designed, with the bosses making their appearances in a humorous manner that reminds one of the joyous times playing Super Mario.

The gaming experience is exceedingly pleasant, and I look forward to advancing further up the leaderboard and earning more medals!

developer_response.body: Hi Firemud. Thank you for such kindly words. We definitely will move forward and deliver more interesting feature in the future version.
